calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2024 Off Calendar

Motion For Prove Up Hearing In An Unlimited Case
Off Calendar Mar-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for request of default judgment against Defendant Michael Farley.

Dept.505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 9:43:05 a.m. and concluding at 9:45:16 a.m.(D505)

Jonathan L. Piper, Esq. appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff Margaret C. Watson via Zoom Video Conference.
Plaintiff Margaret C. Watson sworn via Zoom Video Conference.
Counsel to provide additional evidence to the Court.

Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the Court's review:
Exhibit A: wire transfer records form Charles Schwab
Exhibit B: withdrawal records from Sterling Bank
Exhibit C: miscellaneous records of money Plaintiff transferred to Defendant.
Plaintiff and witness confirms that all exhibits are true and correct.

After reviewing the evidence, hearing the testimony, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover from Defendant the following:

Damages $100,400.00
Interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $750.00

Total Judgment $101,150.00

Proposed judgment signed and executed this day.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2024 Continued To Apr-30-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Prove Up Hearing In An Unlimited Case
Off Calendar Feb-02-2024 Continued To Mar-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:28 am and concluding at 9:37 am.

Plaintiff Margaret C. Watson is present via zoom video conference, represented by Johnathan Piper, Esq., placed under oath and testifies.
Defendant Michael Farley is not present

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

Plaintiff requests a continuance of the matter in order to provide additional evidence to the Court.

The Court GRANTS Plaintiffs request for continuance.

Good cause appearing, the Court continues this matter to March 13, 2024 at 9:00 am in Dept 505. (D505)
